positive: A minimalist, highly stylized geometric arrangement featuring interlocking woodland animals: a sophisticated fox, a majestic owl, and a friendly bear. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, designed as a continuous line art illustration. Use negative space as a primary design element. The style should be modern, elegant, and inspired by Japanese Ukiyo-e and Art Deco aesthetics, rendered with bold black lines against a cream, off-white background. Emphasis on clean silhouettes, high contrast, and decorative symmetry. Vector illustration, perfect for apparel printing, ultra-detailed.
